app.name: SafeSchool
app.description: Multi-role safeguarding and incident reporting platform for Morna International College. Child-led development with child-friendly language throughout. Compliant with LOPIVI, Convivèxit, and Machista Violence protocols (Balearic Islands legislation).

stack.frontend: React + Vite + TypeScript + TailwindCSS + shadcn/ui + Framer Motion + Recharts

roles.label: Pupil
roles.description: School children who can report concerns, send messages, view their own behaviour, and access educational content.
capabilities: Report incidents via child-friendly form with emotion picker
Send urgent help / panic button alerts
Request a chat with a trusted adult
View own behaviour record and escalation ladder

roles.label: Parent / Carer
roles.description: Parents who can monitor their child's wellbeing, view incidents, behaviour, emergency alerts, and communicate with school staff.
capabilities: View child's incident reports (parent-visible only, full detail)
View child's behaviour standing with points, level, and progress
See child's emergency/urgent help alerts sent to staff
Report concerns on behalf of their child
Message staff directly (teachers, SENCO, coordinator, head)
View parent dashboard with trend analytics and stats

roles.label: Teacher
roles.description: Class teachers who manage their class, log incidents, assess reports, view behaviour, and communicate with pupils/parents.
capabilities: View and assess incidents involving class pupils
View class pupil list with incident/behaviour data
Reply to pupil messages and urgent help requests
View pattern alerts relevant to their pupils
View teacher analytics (location charts, type charts, trends)
Access to alert-linked incidents outside normal scope

roles.label: Head of Year
roles.description: Year group leads with all teacher capabilities plus year-wide oversight.
capabilities: View incidents across entire year group (not just own class)
View all pupils in year group

roles.label: Safeguarding Coordinator
roles.description: Safeguarding lead with full school-wide access, protocol management, and compliance tools.
capabilities: Manage formal protocols (Convivèxit, LOPIVI, Machista Violence)
View KPI dashboard with school-wide analytics
Manage annex templates and referral bodies
Change incident status (open, under review, close)

roles.label: Head Teacher
roles.description: Highest authority with full oversight, governance, and external referral capabilities.

roles.label: SENCO (Special Educational Needs Coordinator)
roles.description: Focused on vulnerable pupils with dedicated caseload tracking and progress monitoring.
capabilities: Track pupil progress with observation forms (feelings, attitudes, notes, ratings)
View tracking history timeline per pupil
Search and add pupils to caseload

roles.label: Support Staff
roles.description: Support workers who can log incidents, communicate with pupils, and view assigned pupil data.

incident_reporting.name: Incident Reporting & Management
incident_reporting.description: Dual-mode incident reporting with child-friendly and professional forms, escalation tiers, and full lifecycle management.

subfeatures.name: Child-Friendly Report Form
subfeatures.description: Emotion picker, visual location selector, 'Unknown Person Builder' for describing unidentified individuals, anonymous reporting option

subfeatures.name: Professional Staff Report Form
subfeatures.description: Detailed incident logging with categories, victim/perpetrator selection, witness tracking, and immediate action fields

subfeatures.name: Automatic Escalation
subfeatures.description: 3-tier escalation system (Tier 1: Monitor, Tier 2: Review within 24h, Tier 3: Immediate response). Auto-detects safeguarding triggers

subfeatures.name: Incident Assessment
subfeatures.description: Staff can add internal notes, witness statements, parent summary, mark as added to pupil file, toggle parent visibility

subfeatures.name: Status Lifecycle
subfeatures.description: Incidents flow through: submitted → open → under_review → investigating → escalated → resolved → closed

subfeatures.name: Parent Incident View
subfeatures.description: Full incident reports for parents with status card, details, emotional state, school response section, privacy-protected (other children shown as 'Another pupil')

protocol_management.name: Formal Protocol Management
protocol_management.description: Structured workflows for Balearic Islands safeguarding frameworks.

subfeatures.name: Convivèxit Protocol
subfeatures.description: Anti-bullying protocol with structured phases, risk assessment, and intervention tracking

subfeatures.name: LOPIVI Protocol
subfeatures.description: General child protection protocol compliant with Spanish organic law

subfeatures.name: Machista Violence Protocol
subfeatures.description: Gender-based violence protocol with specific reporting and intervention requirements

subfeatures.name: Interview Management
subfeatures.description: Record and manage interviews linked to protocols

subfeatures.name: Case Tasks
subfeatures.description: Create and track action items associated with protocols

subfeatures.name: Annex Templates
subfeatures.description: Pre-built compliance document templates per framework

subfeatures.name: Risk Assessment
subfeatures.description: Structured risk evaluation within protocol workflows

safe_messaging.name: Safe Messaging System
safe_messaging.description: Secure, role-appropriate communication between all users.

subfeatures.name: Pupil-to-Staff Messaging
subfeatures.description: Pupils message 'safe contacts' (trusted adults). Sorted by form tutor first

subfeatures.name: Urgent Help / Panic Button
subfeatures.description: One-tap urgent help request with location. Creates immediate notification for staff

subfeatures.name: Chat Request
subfeatures.description: Pupils can request a face-to-face chat with a trusted adult

subfeatures.name: Parent-to-Staff Messaging
subfeatures.description: Parents message teachers, SENCO, coordinator, head. Contacts sorted by child's teacher first

subfeatures.name: Parent Emergency Alerts
subfeatures.description: Parents see all urgent help messages their child has sent to staff, with message content, location, recipient, and timestamp

subfeatures.name: Conversation Threads
subfeatures.description: Threaded conversations with read receipts and unread counts

subfeatures.name: Priority System
subfeatures.description: Messages tagged as normal, important, or urgent with visual indicators

pattern_detection.name: Automated Pattern Detection & Alerts
pattern_detection.description: System-generated alerts when concerning patterns are detected across incidents.

subfeatures.name: Repeat Perpetrator Detection
subfeatures.description: Flags when the same child is named as perpetrator in multiple incidents

subfeatures.name: Multi-Victim Alerts
subfeatures.description: Alerts when incidents involve multiple victims

subfeatures.name: Welfare Concern Patterns
subfeatures.description: Detects welfare-related patterns across time

subfeatures.name: Alert Severity Levels
subfeatures.description: Amber and Red alert levels based on pattern severity

subfeatures.name: Alert-Linked Incident Access
subfeatures.description: Staff can view incidents linked to alerts even outside their normal year/class scope

behaviour_tracking.name: Behaviour Escalation Tracker
behaviour_tracking.description: Points-based behaviour system with 7 escalation levels and role-specific views.

subfeatures.name: 7-Level Escalation System
subfeatures.description: Good Standing (0-3), Warning (4-6), Formal Warning (7-9), Suspension Risk (10-14), Suspended (15-19), Term Exclusion (20-24), Full Exclusion (25+)

subfeatures.name: Point Issuance
subfeatures.description: Staff issue points by category (disruption, bullying, physical, verbal, attendance, online, other) with notes

subfeatures.name: Pupil View
subfeatures.description: Visual gauge showing current level, escalation ladder with all levels, point history

subfeatures.name: Parent View
subfeatures.description: See child's behaviour standing on dashboard (colour-coded card with progress bar) and full record on behaviour page

subfeatures.name: Staff View
subfeatures.description: School-wide behaviour list with all pupils, search, issue points dialog

senco_caseload.name: SENCO Caseload Tracker
senco_caseload.description: Dedicated caseload management for SENCO with progress tracking and observations.

subfeatures.name: Caseload Management
subfeatures.description: Add/remove pupils to SENCO caseload with reason and priority

subfeatures.name: Observation Forms
subfeatures.description: Track progress, feelings, attitudes, and notes with 1-5 visual rating scales

subfeatures.name: Tracking Timeline
subfeatures.description: Chronological history of all observations per pupil

subfeatures.name: Expandable Pupil Cards
subfeatures.description: Card-based UI with quick access to tracking history and new observation entry

dashboards_analytics.name: Role-Specific Dashboards & Analytics
dashboards_analytics.description: Customised dashboard views with charts, KPIs, and quick actions per role.

subfeatures.name: Coordinator/Head Dashboard
subfeatures.description: School-wide KPIs, incident stats, active alerts, protocol status, trend charts

subfeatures.name: Teacher Dashboard
subfeatures.description: Class overview, recent incidents, location analytics (bar chart), type distribution (bar chart), monthly trend (line chart)

subfeatures.name: Parent Dashboard
subfeatures.description: Child behaviour standing card, incident stats, monthly trend chart, category breakdown, notification count, school overview

subfeatures.name: Pupil Dashboard
subfeatures.description: Quick report button, urgent help button, chat request button, safe contacts

notifications.name: In-App Notification System
notifications.description: Real-time notifications for incidents, messages, alerts, and protocol updates.

subfeatures.name: Trigger-Based Notifications
subfeatures.description: Auto-generated for: new incidents, urgent help requests, chat requests, tier escalations, protocol updates, parent messages

subfeatures.name: Acknowledgement
subfeatures.description: Users can acknowledge/dismiss notifications

subfeatures.name: Unread Badge
subfeatures.description: Badge count shown in sidebar navigation

education.name: Educational Resource Library
education.description: Safeguarding educational content tailored for pupils, parents, and staff.

subfeatures.name: Role-Filtered Content
subfeatures.description: Content filtered by audience (pupil, parent, staff)

subfeatures.name: Topic Categories
subfeatures.description: Resources organised by safeguarding topics

compliance_governance.name: Compliance & Governance Tools
compliance_governance.description: Tools for managing safeguarding compliance, delegated roles, and external referrals.

subfeatures.name: Delegated Roles
subfeatures.description: Manage LOPIVI delegate and other statutory role assignments

subfeatures.name: Annex Templates
subfeatures.description: Pre-built document templates per compliance framework

subfeatures.name: Referral Bodies
subfeatures.description: Directory of external referral organisations (IB Dona, Fiscalía de Menores, IMAS, etc.)

subfeatures.name: Audit Log
subfeatures.description: Compliance trail of all safeguarding-related actions

user_management.name: User & Profile Management
user_management.description: Profile customisation and pupil management tools.

subfeatures.name: Pupil Avatars
subfeatures.description: Animal avatar picker for pupils (visual identity without photos)

subfeatures.name: My Class / My Year Group
subfeatures.description: Staff view of assigned pupils with links to incident and behaviour data

subfeatures.name: Pupil Search
subfeatures.description: Search pupils across the school for incident reporting, caseload, or behaviour

pages.name: Login / Dashboard
pages.description: Multi-tab login (Pupil/Staff/Parent) or role-specific dashboard when authenticated

pages.name: Report Incident
pages.description: Incident reporting form (child-friendly or professional depending on role)

pages.name: Incidents List
pages.description: Searchable, filterable list of incidents. Parents see 'Your Child's Incident Reports'

pages.name: Incident Detail
pages.description: Full incident view with assessment tools (staff) or detailed parent report

pages.name: Protocols List
pages.description: List of formal safeguarding protocols (coordinator/head/SENCO only)

pages.name: New Protocol
pages.description: Create new Convivèxit, LOPIVI, or Machista Violence protocol

pages.name: Protocol Detail
pages.description: Protocol management with phases, interviews, risk assessment, case tasks

pages.name: Pattern Alerts
pages.description: System-generated alerts with linked incidents and severity levels

pages.name: Messages
pages.description: Threaded messaging inbox. Parents also see child emergency alerts section

pages.name: My Class / All Pupils
pages.description: Pupil list scoped by role (class, year, or school-wide)

pages.name: Behaviour
pages.description: Behaviour tracking — pupil gauge view, parent child record, staff overview

pages.name: SENCO Caseload
pages.description: SENCO-only caseload management with tracking forms

auth.description: Pupil login with school ID, user ID, and PIN
Staff login with email and password
Parent login with email and password

incidents.roles: coordinator, head_teacher, senco, head_of_year, teacher, parent
incidents.description: List incidents (scoped by role; parents see child's parentVisible incidents)
Get incident detail (access scoped by role and child relationship)
Add assessment (staff notes, witness statements, parent summary)

protocols.description: Get protocol detail with interviews and tasks

messages.description: Send a message (normal, chat_request, or urgent_help)
List conversation threads with unread counts
Get child's urgent help messages (emergency alerts for parent)
Get list of safe adults for pupil messaging
Get staff contacts for parent messaging

behaviour.description: Get pupil behaviour record (points, level, history)
Issue behaviour points to a pupil

senco.description: Get tracking history for caseload pupil
Search pupils not yet on caseload

schools_users.description: Get pupils assigned to current staff member

database_tables.name: schools
database_tables.description: School entities with name and settings

database_tables.name: users
database_tables.description: All users (pupils, staff, parents) with role, credentials, year/class, parentOf links, avatar

database_tables.name: incidents
database_tables.description: Core incident records: categories, escalation tiers, victim/perpetrator IDs, emotional state, location, status lifecycle, parent visibility, assessment data

database_tables.name: protocols
database_tables.description: Formal safeguarding protocols (Convivèxit, LOPIVI, Machista Violence) with phases, risk assessment, status

database_tables.name: case_tasks
database_tables.description: Action items linked to protocols with assignee and status

database_tables.name: messages
database_tables.description: Direct messages between users with type (message, chat_request, urgent_help), priority, location

database_tables.name: notifications
database_tables.description: In-app notifications with trigger type, subject, body, delivery and acknowledgement status

database_tables.name: pattern_alerts
database_tables.description: System-generated pattern detection alerts with severity, linked incident IDs, acknowledgement

database_tables.name: behaviour_points
database_tables.description: Behaviour point entries with category, points value, reason, issued by, and pupil reference

database_tables.name: senco_caseload
database_tables.description: SENCO caseload entries linking SENCO to pupils with reason, priority, and active status

database_tables.name: senco_tracking
database_tables.description: Progress tracking observations for SENCO caseload (progress, feelings, attitudes ratings, notes)

database_tables.name: audit_log
database_tables.description: Compliance audit trail of safeguarding actions

database_tables.name: delegated_roles
database_tables.description: Statutory safeguarding role assignments (e.g. LOPIVI delegate)

database_tables.name: referral_bodies
database_tables.description: External referral organisations (IB Dona, Fiscalía de Menores, IMAS, etc.)

pupils.note: All pupils use PIN 1234. Select school 'Morna' then pick name from dropdown.

compliance_frameworks.name: LOPIVI
compliance_frameworks.fullName: Ley Orgánica de Protección Integral a la Infancia y la Adolescencia frente a la Violencia
compliance_frameworks.description: Spanish organic law for comprehensive child protection against violence

compliance_frameworks.name: Convivèxit
compliance_frameworks.fullName: Protocol de prevenció, detecció i intervenció de l'assetjament escolar
compliance_frameworks.description: Balearic Islands anti-bullying protocol for prevention, detection and intervention

compliance_frameworks.name: Machista Violence
compliance_frameworks.fullName: Protocol contra la violència masclista en l'àmbit educatiu
compliance_frameworks.description: Balearic Islands protocol against gender-based violence in educational settings
